privileged_info_summary: The BIO101 Final Examination quiz task requires creating a Canvas quiz with a 90-minute time limit, 1 allowed attempt, access code 'BIO101FINAL', due date 21 days from task start, unlock date 20 days from start, and lock date 22 days from start. All date fields allow ±48 hours tolerance. The BIO101 course is synthetic test data created by create_test_data.rb in a Docker-based Canvas LMS environment.
